subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! On this Sunday, the sixteenth of Rabi'u'th-Thani in the year thirteen hundred and [3.5s]... ...The dark blue and white domes inverted
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان الان که یوم یکشنبه شانزدهم ربیع الثانی سنه هزار و سیصد و
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and mercy, @thankfulness; gratitude
